title: iochroma ortizianthum
intro: Iochroma ortizianthum, also known as the 'Peruvian Flower of the Night', is a species of flowering plant in the Solanaceae family, native to the tropical regions of South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The health benefits of Iochroma ortizianthum include its potential to reduce the risk of heart disease, improve cognitive function, and even have anti-cancer properties. Iochroma ortizianthum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
